title: ctenodon brevipes
intro: Ctenodon brevipes, also known as the Yellow-flowered Ctenodon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Ctenodon brevipes include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. Ctenodon brevipes can be prepared as an herbal remedy by drying the leaves, stems, and roots, and then using them to make teas, tinctures, and infusions.
